extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked with 8.4km remaining on Col du Portet, tested VINGEGAARD multiple times over the final 7km, won the summit finish and extended GC lead to 5:39.
tactical_patterns: UAE isolated GC rivals early before Pogacar's 8.4km attack, showing team strength preservation for final climb offense.
Pogacar launched multiple accelerations over 7km rather than single decisive move, testing Vingegaard's recovery repeatedly.
Carapaz attacked inside 1.5km despite sitting on earlier, revealing he was preserving energy while others worked.
Uran received Igita teammate support while others rode alone, demonstrating value of having domestique survive to finale.

rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: showed first sign of weakness after Carapaz attack inside 1.5km but recovered, concerning fragility signal
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: sat on while others attacked then launched own move at 1.5km, tactical discipline under pressure
rider_signals.MASS Enrique: negative: dropped before final climb even started, unexpectedly poor form on critical GC stage
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: negative: dropped during Pogacar's initial 8.4km attack, lacked response capacity at critical GC moment
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: UAE strength allowed early 8.4km attack with repeated accelerations, superior recovery on sustained efforts
